info.title: Indices API
info.description: The Indices REST API. See docs for details: https://docs.indices.io

get.description:
List all tasks that have been created.

For tasks that are still being generated, input_schema and output_schema may be null. They are guaranteed to be present once the task reaches the ready state.

post.description:
Create a new task to repeatedly perform an action on an external website.

Once created and ready, it can be repeatedly executed using the run endpoint.

When auto_generate_schemas is enabled and schemas are omitted, input_schema and output_schema remain null until generation completes.
Spawn a browser session for manual task completion. If a session already exists, it will be closed and replaced.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to perform manually.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to perform manually.

post.description: Mark the manual browser session as complete and continue the task workflow.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to perform manually.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to perform manually.

get.description:
Retrieve a task by its ID.

For tasks that are still being generated, input_schema and output_schema may be null. They are guaranteed to be present once the task reaches the ready state.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to retrieve.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to retrieve.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to delete.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to delete.

post.description: Retry processing a task that had failed.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to retry.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to retry.

post.summary: Regenerate API for a completed task
post.description:
Regenerate the API code for a task that has already completed successfully.

Creates a new generation attempt using existing HAR data. The previous generation is kept as history.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The ID of the task to regenerate.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to regenerate.

get.description: List all runs for a given task.

parameters.name: task_id

schema.description: The ID of the task to list runs for.
schema.title: Task Id

parameters.description: The ID of the task to list runs for.

post.description: Execute a task that has already been created.

parameters.name: run_id

schema.description: The ID of the run to retrieve.
schema.title: Run Id

parameters.description: The ID of the run to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve stdout and stderr logs for a run.

parameters.name: run_id

schema.description: The ID of the run to get logs for.
schema.title: Run Id

parameters.description: The ID of the run to get logs for.

get.description: List all your secrets. Returns metadata only, not the actual credentials.

post.description: Create a new secret. Credentials are stored securely in 1Password.
Generate a current TOTP code for a login secret that has 2FA configured.

delete.description: Delete a secret. This removes it from both the database and 1Password.

parameters.name: uuid

schema.description: The UUID of the secret to delete.
schema.title: Uuid

parameters.description: The UUID of the secret to delete.

task_id.description: ID of the task to execute.

arguments.description: Arguments to pass to the task. Optional if the task does not require any arguments.

secret_bindings.description: Mapping of secret slot names to secret UUIDs. Each slot defined in the task's required_secrets must be mapped to a user-owned secret.

secret_type.description: Type of secret: 'login' for credentials, 'string' for simple values.

totp_secret.description: Optional TOTP secret (base32 encoded). Only for 'login' type.

display_name.description: Short title shown in the dashboard. Informational only; not used to generate the task.

task.description: Detailed explanation of the task to be performed.

website.description: The website to perform the task on.

input_schema.description: Task input parameters as a JSON schema string. Required when auto_generate_schemas is disabled. When auto_generate_schemas is enabled, this may be omitted and remains null until generation completes.

output_schema.description: Task output schema as a JSON schema string. Required when auto_generate_schemas is disabled. When auto_generate_schemas is enabled, this may be omitted and remains null until generation completes.

is_fully_autonomous.description: If true, the server will run the browser task autonomously. If false, the user must complete the task manually in a spawned browser.

auto_generate_schemas.description: If true, input and output schemas will be automatically generated from captured HAR traffic. When enabled, input_schema and output_schema in the request are optional. If omitted, task responses may return null for these fields until generation completes.

initial_input_values.description: Initial values for input schema fields, keyed by property name. Used during task creation to demonstrate the task. Especially important for tasks requiring authentication, as initial credentials must be provided.

secrets.description: List of secrets to use for this task.

secret_uuid.description: UUID of the secret to bind.

description.description: Optional description of what this secret is used for (helps generate meaningful slot names).

CreationSecret.title: CreationSecret
CreationSecret.description: A secret provided during task creation

uuid.description: Unique identifier of the deleted secret.

deleted.description: Whether the secret was successfully deleted.

task_id.description: ID of the task executed in this run.

arguments.description: Arguments in this run for the task's input parameters.

secret_bindings.description: Secrets to use for this run. This dict must be a mapping of secret slot names to secret UUIDs.

result_json.description: Execution result of the run. In JSON, matching the task's output schema.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the object was created.

finished_at.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated.

stdout.description: Standard output from the run execution.

stderr.description: Standard error output from the run execution.

has_totp.description: Whether the secret has a TOTP configured (only applicable for login type).

created_at.description: Timestamp when the secret was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the secret was last updated.

name.description: Name of the secret slot (used as env var prefix, e.g., 'LOGIN' → LOGIN_USERNAME).

requires_totp.description: Whether this login slot requires 2FA/TOTP. Only applicable for 'login' type.

SecretSlotDefinition.title: SecretSlotDefinition
SecretSlotDefinition.description: Definition of a secret slot that a task requires.

http_only.description: Whether the cookie is HTTP only.

SessionCookie.title: SessionCookie
SessionCookie.description: A cookie to set in the browser session.

session_id.description: Opaque identifier for the spawned browser session.

iframe_url.description: URL to embed in an iframe to control the browser.

use_proxy.description: If true, spawn the browser session using a proxy.

cookies.description: Initial cookies to set in the browser session.

current_state.description: Current state of the task, in particular whether it is ready to use.

display_name.description: Short title shown in the dashboard. Informational only.

task.description: Detailed explanation of the task to be performed.

website.description: The website to perform the task on.

input_schema.description: Task input schema as a JSON schema string. May be null while the task is not ready (e.g. schema generation in progress). Guaranteed non-null when current_state is ready.

output_schema.description: Task output schema as a JSON schema string. May be null while the task is not ready (e.g. schema generation in progress). Guaranteed non-null when current_state is ready.

creation_auto_generate_schemas.description: Whether schemas were configured to auto-generate during task creation, if available.

required_secrets.description: List of secrets that must be provided when running this task.

creation_secrets.description: List of secrets provided during task creation.

secret_bindings.description: Mapping of required secret slot names to secret UUIDs bound during task creation.

failure_info.description: Failure information if the task failed, including user-friendly explanation and suggestions

created_at.description: Timestamp when the object was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated.

TaskFailureInfo.title: TaskFailureInfo
TaskFailureInfo.description: Information about why a task failed, for user display.

ApiKeyAuth.description: Enter your API key as the bearer token. Set header: `Authorization` to `Bearer <api_key>`

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Create a task to repeatedly perform an action on an external website.

tags.name: Secrets
tags.description: Manage secrets like login credentials and API keys.
